Admin.title: Admin
Admin.inviteDescription: Add an email address to give a new user access to the system.
Admin.adminTipDescription: Only active users can log in. Users not yet in the system must be invited first.
Admin.revokeSelfError: You cannot revoke your own admin rights.

Settings.title: Settings

onboarding.description: Your personal gardening assistant. Let's get you set up with the basic features.
onboarding.featureGardens: Manage multiple gardens, track plants, and share access with others.
onboarding.featureCalendar: A dynamic calendar showing when to prune, water, or harvest based on your plants.
onboarding.featureAi: Get smart advice and automated plant identification using AI.
onboarding.apiSetup: To unlock all features, you need to set up some API keys in your settings.
onboarding.trefleDesc: Needed to search and identify plants. Get a free token at trefle.io.
onboarding.aiDesc: Power the 'Fill with AI' and 'Smart Advice' features. We recommend OpenRouter for access to multiple models.
onboarding.weatherDesc: Enables local weather forecasts and garden-specific advice. Get a free key at openweathermap.org.

Settings.name: Name
Settings.loginToManage: Log in to manage your settings.
Settings.emailLinked: Email address is linked to your Google account.
Settings.trefleHelp: Required for searching plants. Get a free token at trefle.io.
Settings.weatherHelp: Used for weather forecasts and warnings per garden. Get a free key at openweathermap.org.

multipleGardens.title: Multiple Gardens
multipleGardens.description: Organize your plants per location and share access with others.

weatherData.title: Live Weather Data
weatherData.description: Real-time weather forecast per garden for smart planning.

aiAdvice.title: AI Garden Advice
aiAdvice.description: Personalized advice based on your plants and the current weather.

todoList.title: Interactive To-do
todoList.description: Check off pruning and planting tasks in your personal yearly overview.

tips.noGardens: Start by adding your first garden to organize your plant collection.
tips.noPlants: Add your first plants to your garden to fill your calendar.
tips.regular: Check the calendar to see which plants need attention this month.
